# function: op_or

The logical OR operation. Represents a logical OR of multiple operations. Can be used to combine other operations such as `op_and`, `op_or`, `op_not`, `op_status_code_check`, `op_header_check`, or `op_jsonpath`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
output "operand" {
  value = provider::sentry::op_or(
    provider::sentry::op_status_code_check("equals", 404),
    provider::sentry::op_status_code_check("equals", 500),
  )
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
op_or(children string...) string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->

<!-- variadic argument generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `children` (Variadic, String) The operations to combine.
